scaffoldCapabilities: classifies all 63 blocked high-risk rows from src/blocked_row_pre_enablement.rs
encodes display/render, cursor/input, and debug/crash recovery models
rejects missing row id, official setting key, target path, backup path, and token
rejects non-temp or not-explicitly-temp proof targets
persists and reloads recovery plans under temp paths only
rereads restored temp config through the project parser
selects keep/apply only after valid confirmation
refuses live-target execution while live execution is disabled
scaffoldLimitations: does not integrate with production write planning or apply flow
does not change the write allowlist
does not prove live display/render safety
does not prove live cursor/input safety
does not prove live debug/crash safety
does not provide explicit high-risk enablement approval
does not resolve cursor.default_monitor runtime monitor-name allowlist/readback proof
proofStillMissing: production gate integration with write planning/apply flow
production gate acceptance/rejection tests against future gated write path
live/runtime safety proof or explicit future waiver for all 63 rows
nextRecommendedSprint: Integrate high-risk persisted recovery scaffold into production gate dry-run sprint
